prestazioni: Engine: 1G-FE (2.0L inline-6, naturally aspirated) forced induction via HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2530 ball-bearing turbo, 1.5-bar base boost, HKS 264° camshafts, and HKS Hi-Power fuel pump) paired with a Tomei 76mm titanium exhaust manifold and custom 3-inch stainless downpipe with GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise boost mapping.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (IS200-specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, and 12-position adjustable ride height) combined with Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow steel) and Cusco rear upper strut brace (20mm solid steel) for chassis rigidity, plus Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) to eliminate understeer.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 45% preload) with OS Giken 1.5-way clutch (ceramic-metallic, 800kg clamping force) and TRD 4.300 final drive ratio for improved acceleration, mated to a KAAZ 1.5-way limited-slip differential and custom 3.7-inch driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop to handle increased torque.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (IS200-specific, carbon fiber front bumper, overfenders, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and Varis Japan carbon fiber hood (dual air outlets, 50% weight reduction).

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +22 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) with custom 5x114.3 hub conversion, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) and fitted with Project Kics R40 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers (356mm rotors) for aggressive stance and stopping power.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (IS200-specific mounts, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses, custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) on a NRG quick-release hub, and full carbon fiber dash overlay (Seibon) with Defi BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod.
